user_query: Give me a summary of all activity related to my next calendar event.

plan.query: Give me a summary of all activity related to my next calendar event.
plan.reasoning: The query focuses on retrieving information about calendar events, which falls under the capabilities of the graph agent to access emails and calendar data.

steps.task: Retrieve details of the next calendar event, including any related emails and communication history.

plan.synthesis: Compile the information from the retrieved calendar event details and related communication to provide a summary of all activity associated with that event.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve details of the next calendar event, including any related emails and communication history.
